Verifica que CESBS apareció en la grilla. TotalCount debe ser 92 y el registro debe existir en Entities.
Request Information
Request Method: POST
Request URL: https://demo.serenity.is/Services/Northwind/Customer/List
Response Information
Response Code: 200 - OK
Mean time per request: 600ms
Mean size per request: 22.99KB
Test Pass Percentage
100 %
